video_info.title: India Tour Of Ireland 2026
video_info.shortDescription: After a humbling outing in Belfast, Team India return under Shreyas Iyer’s leadership for the 2nd and final T20I against hosts Ireland. Can they bounce back and square the series? Find out as we bring you all the action from this Ireland vs India T20I, LIVE on Sony LIV.
video_info.longDescription: After a humbling outing in Belfast, Team India return under Shreyas Iyer’s leadership for the 2nd and final T20I against hosts Ireland. Can they bounce back and square the series? Find out as we bring you all the action from this Ireland vs India T20I, LIVE on Sony LIV.
